HOME ABOUT PLAY GAME POLICIES

Perfect Paw Match

The most adorable 3D match-3 adventure featuring Zio and Zia Cat. A premium anime-inspired experience for cat lovers.

Our Unique Cat Stories

Welcome to Perfect Paw Match, a world where luxury meets playfulness. Each card in our collection represents a unique rescue cat journey, starting with our brave hosts Zio and Zia. Our game follows their adventure through the Pastel World, collecting legendary artifacts that glitter with cosmic energy.

Designed with a professional Hyper-gloss editorial anime aesthetic, we provide a visual experience unlike any other puzzle game. Dive into the stories behind every item and help Zio and Zia complete their royal collection!

The Paw Collection

Discover the 14 legendary items. Every item is meticulously 3D rendered with professional studio lighting.

Golden Paw

A symbol of divine luck, representing the first step of Zio's journey across the heavens.

Indigo Bowtie

Hand-crafted from the finest midnight-blue silk, a gift for Zio's hosting excellence.

Fuchsia Ribbon

Soft flowing ribbon that once belonged to a fabled cat princess, now Zia's prized possession.

Crystal Ball

Reveals hidden match-3 patterns to those with a pure heart and a love for cats.

Royal Cat Bed

A plush sanctuary designed for cosmic naps, offering a moment of ultimate peace.

Silver Shopping Bag

A tribute to luxury cat-kind, used to carry precious treats from the celestial market.

💎

Emerald Fish

This translucent glass fish glows brighter whenever a perfect match is made in the deep green lagoons.

🎙️

Blue Microphone

Designed for Zio's grand announcements, amplifying the purrs of victory across the whole Paw World.

🪞

Pink Mirror

Zia uses this vintage-style mirror to ensure her fuchsia ribbon is always tied in a perfect bow.

👑

Diamond Collar

Encrusted with star-diamonds, this collar signifies the ultimate status within the kingdom.

🪶

Feather Stick

An iridescent toy used by cat elders to train young Zio in the art of graceful play.

🛋️

Velvet Cushion

A royal blue square of comfort that once adorned the throne of the Great Cat King.

⭐

Star Charm

A gold charm that sparkles with magical energy, granting extra time to solve complex puzzles.

🧶

Glittery Yarn Ball

Made of shimmering light threads, the favorite toy for kittens playing in the celestial moonlight.

Meet Zio & Zia

Zio Cat

The energetic host who loves luxury accessories and cosmic toys.

Zia Cat

The clever companion with a passion for elegant ribbons and stories.
